titles.title: Jesus Is All the World to Me

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus is all the world to me, My life, my joy, my all; He is my strength from day to day, Without Him I would fall.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When I am sad to Him I go, No other one can cheer me so; When I am sad He make me glad, He's my Friend.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Jesus is all the world to me, And true to Him I'll be; O how could I this Friend deny, When He's so true me?

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Following Him I know I'm right, He watches o'er me Day and night; Following Him by day and night, He's my Friend.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Jesus is all the world to me, I want no better friend; I trust Him now, I'll trust when Life's fleeting days shall end.

verse.name: v6
